title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
I recently purchased the Urban Jungle by Safari Cabin Trolley Bag, and it has exceeded my expectations in every way.

Pros:

✅ Stylish & Eye-Catching – The Urban Yellow color is vibrant and makes it easy to spot at baggage claim. It has a sleek, modern design that stands out.
✅ Sturdy & Durable – Made of hardside polycarbonate, the suitcase feels tough yet lightweight, providing excellent protection for belongings.
✅ Smooth Mobility – The 8 spinner wheels glide effortlessly, making it easy to maneuver through airports and crowded spaces.
✅ USB Charging Port – A convenient feature for keeping my phone and devices charged on the go.
✅ TSA Lock for Security – Adds peace of mind while traveling, especially for international trips.

Cons:

⚠️ Limited Space for Longer Trips – Ideal for short getaways but may be small for extended vacations.
⚠️ No Built-in Power Bank – The USB port is great, but you’ll need to carry your own power bank.

Final Verdict:

If you're looking for a compact, stylish, and functional carry-on with great security features, this is a fantastic choice. The Urban Jungle Trolley Bag delivers on durability, convenience, and aesthetics. Highly recommended for frequent travelers!

I recently purchased this Mokobara polycarbonate cabin suitcase and the experience has been excellent.

The build quality is solid and premium. The polycarbonate shell feels sturdy yet lightweight. The zipper quality and inner fabric finishing are top-notch and clearly well thought through. The wheels glide smoothly, and the overall design is both functional and elegant.

Everything about the product reflects attention to detail and good manufacturing standards. It is definitely value for money and a reliable travel companion.

Highly recommended.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
Mokobara delivered as expected, the bag has a premium finish with very good built quality, the chains were of highest standard and the wheels are very smooth. The telescopic handle has 3 levels and also of good quality. The best is the easily accessible extra compartment for laptop and other important documents.
The price is a little bit on the higher side but the quality of the product will live up to it. This review is my first impression of the product, will review it more after using it on a trip.
One little setback is or i would say icing on the cake would be to provide some free travel organising bags and an usb charging port which other brand offer at this price range.
Overall, if your budget is 7k go for it without second thoughts.
Update : After using it for a year, I’ve found the trolley to be sturdy and well-balanced. However, one drawback is that it easily exceeds the 7 kg limit, with very less content. especially when packing electronics like a laptop and power banks that are already heavy on their own. Additionally, the front compartment tends to push inward, reducing the main storage space inside.

title: 5.0 out of 5 stars
text:
Needed a minute occasional bag for mild adjacent travels for two folks. This built from American Tourister suits that job and we managed a few trips with just enough space for two folks well. Built is good, is lightweight and large enough for two folks. Wheels are good to use and T-bar is easy to use due to bags increased length 165cm.

The con is the that Tbar is not moderate stretched it only goes from 100 to zero extension a bit of a bother.
Also due to length, it's not suitable as carrying bag for two folks in planes.
